description: Detects unsafe reflection in C#: Type.GetType() with dynamic input, Activator.CreateInstance() with dynamic type, Assembly.LoadFrom/LoadFile() with dynamic path. JSON version matches all invocation expressions (cannot filter by method name or argument type without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Method invocation detected -- verify this is not Type.GetType(), Activator.CreateInstance(), or Assembly.LoadFrom() with dynamic user-controlled input enabling reflection injection
